entries.name: nixos-server
entries.label: NixOS 25.11 Server
entries.description: Full NixOS install ISO for QEMU. Manual install via serial/VNC.

entries.name: nixos-desktop
entries.label: NixOS 25.11 Desktop (GNOME)
entries.description: Full NixOS GNOME install ISO for QEMU. Requires desktop mode (VGA+VNC).

entries.name: cirros
entries.label: CirrOS 0.6.3
entries.description: Minimal cloud test image (~20 MB). Ideal for testing provisioning.

entries.name: opensuse
entries.label: openSUSE Leap 15.6
entries.description: Stable enterprise Linux from SUSE. Zypper package manager.

entries.name: ubuntu
entries.label: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS
entries.description: Popular general-purpose Linux. Long-term support release.

entries.name: debian
entries.label: Debian 12 (Bookworm)
entries.description: Universal stable Linux. The base for Ubuntu and many derivatives.

entries.name: fedora
entries.label: Fedora 42 Cloud
entries.description: Cutting-edge Linux from Red Hat. DNF package manager.

entries.name: alpine
entries.label: Alpine Linux 3.21
entries.description: Minimal security-focused Linux (~50 MB). musl libc, apk package manager.

entries.name: arch
entries.label: Arch Linux
entries.description: Rolling-release Linux for advanced users. Pacman package manager.
